body.title: CLOSED: Remove wild_igor/igor/network/ from Igor
body.result: network/ deleted (1856 lines); main.py stubs _drain_network(); 3 test files skipped for proxy/channels/system_proxy relocation
body.description:
wild_igor/igor/network/ (discord_bot, listener, proxy, system_proxy, 8 channel files) is transport infrastructure that belongs in agent_datacenter devices. After Discord is relocated (T-adc-discord-phase5), remove the network/ directory from Igor. The listener thread (net_listener at main.py:746) and all channel files go with it.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/network/ (delete), wild_igor/igor/main.py (remove net_listener.start(), listener import, web_server.broadcast_activity calls)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; safeguards (main.py HIGH inertia — pre-approved for this migration)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: delete network/ after Discord relocated; remove listener/channel wiring from main.py. Out of scope: migrating listener functionality (separate device ticket if needed).
**Test plan:** Igor boots without network/ directory. Inbound channel messages (Gmail, Discord DM) need alternative path — document what's lost until listener device is built.
